message:
feat(cx): expand cancellation context and update IO cancellation tests

cx.rs: expand the cancellation context (Cx) with additional state
tracking for improved cancellation propagation.

tests/io_cancellation.rs: update test imports and assertions to match
the expanded Cx API surface, ensuring cancellation tests exercise the
new state transitions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
